recent_calls.summary: The user, Chipo, called to schedule an urgent appointment for an AC breakdown. The agent documented the issue as urgent and informed Chipo that the team would follow up on the next business day since it was outside regular hours. The call ended with the user confirming the details and no further assistance requested.

The user called to schedule a plumbing service appointment for their sump pump, which has been making loud vibration noises intermittently. The agent confirmed the details, updated the user's callback number, and scheduled the earliest available appointment. The user declined information about maintenance programs and did not provide feedback on the AI assistant.

The user, Alvia, reported that her air conditioning unit is still not working after a technician visit and requested a follow-up service appointment for the next morning between 8 AM and 12 PM. The agent confirmed the details, including the service address and contact number, and noted that this is a follow-up for the same issue. The call ended with the agent assuring that the team will follow up to confirm the appointment.

Judith called about an urgent air conditioning issue at her home, mentioning she has a newborn and the AC was still cooling despite being turned off. The agent marked the request as an emergency and assured Judith that the team would prioritize her case and contact her on the next business day. The call ended with confirmation of contact details and no further requests from Judith.

The user, Jennifer Taylor, called about an emergency plumbing issue involving no hot water from Noritz tankless water heaters at a commercial location in Saint Louis. The agent documented the emergency and prioritized it for the team to follow up the next business day, explaining that no immediate callback was possible due to after-hours. The call ended with the user understanding the situation and no further requests.

Rick called to report that his air handler, replaced earlier that day, was not cooling his home properly despite running all day. The agent collected his service address and contact information, confirmed the issue as a cooling problem, and scheduled a service appointment for the next business day. Rick declined additional information about maintenance programs and feedback requests.

The user, Jamie, called to schedule a cooling system service appointment due to the system not cooling below 75 degrees. The agent confirmed the issue, appointment time for tomorrow at 8 AM, and updated the service address to 431 Keeney Drive, Saint Charles, Missouri. The agent assured Jamie that the team would follow up next business day to confirm availability.

Robin Faulkner called to inquire about the cost of a routine HVAC maintenance service for their air conditioning unit. The agent took a detailed message including contact information and service preferences, and confirmed that the team would reach out to schedule the service and provide pricing information. Robin also expressed interest in receiving information about home maintenance programs.

The user called to inquire about getting the refrigerant in their AC unit checked during a service appointment. The agent confirmed it was not an emergency and asked for the user's full name to proceed.

Deana called to report that her AC unit's fan is not working and requested emergency assistance due to high temperatures and the presence of an older adult with congestive heart failure in the home. The agent documented the emergency, collected the service address and contact information, and escalated the issue for follow-up on the next business day. The call ended with the agent assuring Deana that the team will contact her soon.

The user, Juan, called to schedule a cooling service for a thermostat issue that prevents the condenser from turning on. The agent confirmed the service details, address, and contact information, and informed Juan that the team will confirm availability the next business day. The call ended with the user acknowledging the information.

The user called to inquire about the scheduling of their AC unit installation. The agent informed the user that the exact date could not be confirmed after hours but assured that the team would contact them on the next business day to schedule the earliest possible installation. The user declined further assistance and the call ended.
The call was very brief, with the agent introducing herself and asking how she could help, but the user hung up immediately without responding.

The user called to inquire about financing options, specifically about the Okinus provider and discrepancies in monthly payment quotes. The agent provided general information about financing options and assured the user that the team would follow up next business day with specific details and clarification on the monthly payment. The call ended with the agent confirming a follow-up would occur.
The call was very brief with only the agent greeting the user and no further interaction before the user hung up.

The user called back after a previous return call and spoke briefly with the after-hours assistant, who offered to take their information for a follow-up. The call ended shortly after without completing the information exchange.
The user requested to speak with a live representative, and the agent promptly transferred the call to another live agent. The transfer was successful, and the call ended shortly after.

Juan called to request same-day service for a cooling system issue where the thermostat is not turning on the condenser. The agent confirmed the details and informed Juan that no slots were available today, and Juan said he would call back tomorrow if anything changes. The call ended with the user acknowledging and thanking the agent.

The user called to reschedule an appointment set for tomorrow at noon but decided to cancel it instead and will call back when ready to reschedule. The agent confirmed the cancellation and informed the user to mention any specific requests when rescheduling.
The user called and was quickly transferred to a live customer service representative as requested. The agent facilitated the transfer without any issues.

The user called to provide their service address but was unsure of the ZIP code, stating it was the same as the agent's business location. The agent attempted to clarify the ZIP code to proceed with the request, but the call ended before the ZIP code was confirmed or the request was completed.
The user requested to speak to a live representative, and the agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent. The transfer was successful, and the call ended shortly after.
The call was initiated by the user Kay but there was no response or interaction during the call. The agent attempted to engage Kay but received no reply, and the call ended due to inactivity.

Michelle called to schedule an HVAC repair appointment for Ozi Payne, a renter at 2221 Woodson Rd, Unit B, Overland, MO. The agent confirmed the details and booked an appointment for July 3, 2026, at 12 PM. The user declined to provide feedback at the end of the call.
The user called and requested to speak with Nicole. The agent attempted to connect the user and successfully transferred the call to another agent.

The user called to cancel a previously scheduled service call and reschedule it for next week due to a conflicting appointment. The agent acknowledged the request and transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance.

The call involved repeated exchanges where the agent, Sophie from Budget, attempted to assist the user, who repeatedly identified as representatives from American Home Shield and then initiated a survey. The conversation did not progress to any service request or resolution, ending with the user concluding the survey and hanging up.

The user called to get a summary of the work done on their air conditioner and furnace and requested to speak with the technician. The agent attempted to connect the user to a live agent and successfully transferred the call. The user did not receive the information directly from the agent.
The user requested to speak with a human representative, and the agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance.

The user, Christy Medling, called to request a standard repair for her air conditioner's fan that stopped working. The agent collected all necessary details and informed her of the earliest available appointment slot, which is the next day at 12 PM. The user confirmed the summary and the agent proceeded to schedule the service.

The user inquired about the procedure for technician arrival notifications for a scheduled visit between twelve and two. The agent attempted to assist but then transferred the call to a live agent for further help. The call ended with a successful transfer.
The user called to inquire about emergency service appointments. The agent asked for more details about the issue, but the call ended abruptly before completion.
The call was very brief and ended abruptly after the agent's initial greeting and request for the user's ZIP code. The user hung up immediately without responding.

The user called to follow up on a claim filed with American Home Shield regarding a heating and cooling issue involving a leak and banging noise. The agent confirmed the details, updated the preferred appointment time to tomorrow afternoon, and informed the user that someone would reach out to confirm availability. The call ended with the user satisfied and the service request noted for follow-up.
The user called and requested to speak to a representative. The agent acknowledged the request and successfully transferred the call to a live agent.
The user requested to speak with a human operator, and the agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent. The transfer was successful, and the call ended shortly after.

The user called to speak with Daniel Legris regarding a business idea proposal but refused to provide the service address ZIP code when requested by the agent. The call ended without the agent being able to assist further due to lack of information.
The user called Budget and reported a downforce issue, requesting to speak with someone who could assist. The agent acknowledged the issue and transferred the call to a live agent for further help.
The user called and requested to speak with Amy. The agent attempted to connect the user and successfully transferred the call to another agent.
The call was initiated by the user but ended abruptly without any interaction or request for services. The agent attempted to engage the user but received no response before the user hung up.

Juan called to schedule an appointment for his air conditioner that is not cooling well. The agent booked a morning appointment for Monday, July 6, 2026, at 8 AM and confirmed the details with Juan. Juan provided positive feedback, rating the experience five stars.
The user requested to speak to a representative, and the agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent. The transfer was successful, and the call ended shortly after.

Erica Alexander called to inquire about the technician's arrival time for her air conditioning repair. The agent confirmed her appointment scheduled for 2 PM onwards with technician Cole and informed her about the notification process. The call ended with no further requests from Erica.
The user requested to speak to a representative, and the agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent. The transfer was successful, and the call ended shortly after.
The user requested to speak with a live agent, and the initial agent transferred the call successfully to another representative.
The user called Budget and was greeted by the agent Sophie, who then transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance. The call lasted 15 seconds and ended with a successful transfer.

The user called to report that they were at the scheduled water heater inspection address but no one was answering. The agent attempted to assist by transferring the call to a live agent for further help.
The user requested to speak to a real representative, and the agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent. The transfer was successful, and the call ended shortly after.
The user requested to speak to a customer representative or supervisor, and the agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent. The transfer was completed successfully without any issues.

The user, Sharon Semore, called to confirm if she had a service call scheduled. The agent confirmed an appointment for 11:30 AM with technician Brooks and explained the notification process. The call ended with no further questions from the user.
